componentDescription: A versatile component for displaying a contextual menu, typically on right-click, offering various actions.

children.description: The content to be rendered inside the context menu, typically the element that triggers the menu.

items.description: An optional array of configuration objects for each menu item, defining its text, action, etc.

size.description: Defines the size variant of the context menu components.

variant.description: Specifies the visual styling variant for the context menu.

disableNativeContextMenu.description: Controls whether the browser's native context menu is disabled when right-clicking.

onOpenChange.description: A callback function invoked when the context menu's open state changes.

views.description: Allows customization of the context menu's internal component styles.

additionalProps.description: Enables additional arbitrary properties to be passed to the component.
